name: Exelon
analysis: EXC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $46.5900, stop $43.7085, target $55.2345 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
